data.title: Sealed Air to go private in $10.3 billion deal with a big push for ecommerce
data.description: Sealed Air reported $5.4 billion in 2024 sales and serves customers in 117 countries across ecommerce, logistics, food, health care and industrial markets.

data.title: Provi passes $5 billion in GMV as digital ordering gains traction
data.description: The announcement comes as beverage suppliers, distributors and retailers navigate a period of stabilizing demand and rising pressure to improve efficiency.

data.title: Znode expands integration capabilities with enhanced ecommerce tools
data.description: The enhancement introduces “data exchanges,” which expand Znode’s native ability to connect directly to enterprise systems such as enterprise resource planning (ERP), customer relationship management (CRM), and product information management (PIM) platforms.

data.title: Ecommerce earnings recap: What you missed from JD.com and Disney
data.description: Food delivery proved to be a growing opportunity in JD.com's ecommerce business, the company shared in Q3 earnings.

data.title: GrubMarket buys Procurant, expanding AI footprint in fresh food procurement
data.description: Executives said the combined platforms will create new opportunities for automation, real-time supply-chain visibility and digital trading across GrubMarket’s network of wholesale customers and subsidiaries.
